chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos.970 & 971 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge SCRA No.970 of 2024 Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.4323/2024 2. For hearing of main case 3. For order on CMA No.4324/2024 SCRA No.971 of 2024 Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection No.7 2. For order on CMA No.4325/2024 3. For hearing of main case 4. For order on CMA No.4326/2024 11.02.2026 Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the question before the Court is already covered against the applicant-department by virtue of Supreme Court Judgment in the case of M/s. Super Asia reported as 2019 SCMR 1735 and in the case of M/s. Wak Limited reported as 2025 SCMR 1230, in view hereof these reference applications may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned-Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office to place a copy hereof in the connected reference application. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
